description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, matte black finish and ergonomic grip. The frame is robust, featuring a squared-off trigger guard and a slide with minimal external markings. Two detachable magazines are shown alongside, one with a flat base and the other with an extended, slightly flared base for improved handling. The barrel is of medium length, flush with the slide, and appears to be unthreaded with a smooth exterior. The grip is contoured for comfort, likely made of polymer, and the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and synthetic materials. The design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or decorative engravings.
description: A modern black semi-automatic handgun with ergonomic grip and two detachable magazines, one with an extended base. The design is sleek and functional, with a matte finish and minimal markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the barrel opening and a narrow profile.
description_view_1: The left side of the handgun is visible, displaying the full slide, grip, and both magazines, one with an extended base.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the slide and grip, with the magazines aligned beside it.
description_view_3: The right side of the handgun is shown, mirroring the left, with clear views of the magazines and grip contours.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured and slightly flared at the base, constructed from a matte black polymer with subtle texturing for enhanced hold. It features ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, with gentle finger grooves and a smooth backstrap. There are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The surface appears to be non-slip, aiding in secure handling during use.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a robust, thick profile and a slight undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. Its edges are smooth, and the guard is integrated seamlessly into the frame, providing ample space for gloved fingers. There is no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a clean and functional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded exterior. There are no visible ports, compensators, or fluting, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or distinctive features are apparent on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazines feature two distinct base designs: one is flat and flush with the magazine body, while the other has an extended, slightly flared base with a rounded contour for improved grip. Both bases are smooth and lack visible logos or texturing, focusing on functional simplicity.
